0.title: AI Recommendation Generated

databaseQueries.query: SELECT `permissions`.*, `model_has_permissions`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_permissions`.`permission_id` as `pivot_permission_id`, `model_has_permissions`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` FROM `permissions` inner join `model_has_permissions` on `permissions`.`id` = `model_has_permissions`.`permission_id` WHERE `model_has_permissions`.`model_id` in (1) and `model_has_permissions`.`model_type` = 'App\\Models\\User'

SELECT `roles`.*, `model_has_roles`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_roles`.`role_id` as `pivot_role_id`, `model_has_roles`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` FROM `roles` inner join `model_has_roles` on `roles`.`id` = `model_has_roles`.`role_id` WHERE `model_has_roles`.`model_id` in (1) and `model_has_roles`.`model_type` = 'App\\Models\\User'
SELECT `farms`.`name`, `farms`.`id` FROM `farms` ORDER BY `farms`.`name` ASC LIMIT 50

data.*tooltip: Uses Google Gemini AI to generate a recommendation based on the soil analysis values entered above.

*attributes.recommendation:
1st Application - Start of Rainy Season
* Apply recommended NPK per tree evenly around the base (5 cm deep).

2nd Application - Before End of Rainy Season
* Repeat same rate, add 1 kg compost or manure per tree.

3rd Application - Post-Harvest (mature trees)
* Light top-dressing with ½ rate 14-14-14 or compost.

Maintain soil pH 6.0–7.0 and continue adding organic materials yearly.

data.recommendation:
SOIL CONDITION
*   Soil pH: 5.8 — Good. This pH level is good for coffee plants to take in nutrients from the soil.
*   Organic Matter: 1.5% — Low. The soil needs more organic matter to hold water and nutrients better for the coffee plants.
*   Nitrogen (N): 0.15% — Low. Coffee plants need more nitrogen for strong leaf growth and overall health.
*   Phosphorus (P): 13 ppm — Low. Coffee plants need more phosphorus for good root growth and to help produce flowers and fruits.
*   Potassium (K): 150 ppm — Good. The soil has enough potassium for now, which helps with fruit quality and makes plants stronger against diseases.

WHAT TO APPLY
*   Well-rotted chicken manure or compost: Apply 5 to 10 kilograms per coffee plant — Once a year, at the start of the rainy season (around May or June). Spread it around the base of the plant, but not touching the stem

data.recommendation:
SOIL CONDITION
*   Soil pH: 5.8 — Good. This pH level is good for coffee plants to take in nutrients from the soil.
*   Organic Matter: 1.5% — Low. The soil needs more organic matter to hold water and nutrients better for the coffee plants.
*   Nitrogen (N): 0.15% — Low. Coffee plants need more nitrogen for strong leaf growth and overall health.
*   Phosphorus (P): 13 ppm — Low. Coffee plants need more phosphorus for good root growth and to help produce flowers and fruits.
*   Potassium (K): 150 ppm — Good. The soil has enough potassium for now, which helps with fruit quality and makes plants stronger against diseases.

WHAT TO APPLY
*   Well-rotted chicken manure or compost: Apply 5 to 10 kilograms per coffee plant — Once a year, at the start of the rainy season (around May or June). Spread it around the base of the plant, but not touching the stem

Maintain soil pH 6.0–7.0 and continue adding organic materials yearly.
